candidates.row_label: Depreciation and impairment of tangible, intangible and right-of-use assets
candidates.why: Only visible operating D&A-like row above financial items, but it is a broad combined depreciation/impairment line and not clearly tied specifically to COGS or to the selected COGS row 'Raw materials and consumables'. Using it for COGS_DA would risk misallocation and double counting.

variables.notes: No explicit COGS-specific depreciation/amortisation row is shown. The only D&A-like line is a combined operating depreciation/impairment row at a higher level and cannot be safely assigned to COGS.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and impairment of tangible, intangible and right-of-use assets
candidates.why: This is the only operating D&A-like row above financial items and it appears separate from the selected XSGA component rows ('Staff costs', 'Other external costs', 'Other operating expenses'). However, it is a broad combined depreciation/impairment line, not clearly SG&A-specific, and may include production-related amounts, so adding it to XSGA_DA would risk misclassification and double counting.

variables.notes: There is a separate operating depreciation/impairment line, but it is not bucket-specific to SG&A and may span multiple operating functions. Conservative treatment is to not add it automatically; manual review is warranted if a functional split is available elsewhere.
